_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Advise managers and operators on language and cultural issues that impact organization objectives.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to communicate regulatory risk and compliance status to executive and board-level audiences, translating legal and technical compliance details into business impact language.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-A-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-K-006 (LS, cosine: 0.420), AI-T-009 (AI, cosine: 0.410).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.7/10 (raw 0.465). Shared vocabulary: [impact, language]. DCWF-only terms [advise, cultural, issues, managers, objectives, operators] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, audiences, board, business, communicate, compliance] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.877 (P=0.884, R=0.871). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Advise managers and operators on language and cultural issues that impact organi" and "Ability to communicate regulatory risk and compliance status to executive and bo" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.428 ≈ STS 0.465 (gap 0.036). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [impact, language] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.3%. Shared tokens: [impact, language]. DCWF-only: [advise, cultural, issues, managers, objectives, operators]. WIDAI-only: [ability, audiences, board, business, communicate, compliance].
